name: Guardian Angel Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pudding mix and milk in a bowl; cook until mixture boils.
2. Cool slightly, then stir in sour cream. Chill thoroughly.
3. Split the cake into 2 or 3 layers.
4. Spread the chocolate mixture between layers.
5. Cover the top and sides of the cake with whipped cream, sweetened with confectioners' sugar.
6. Garnish with shaved chocolate. Serves 10.
Posted by Ethel Snyder  on August 08, 1997
